LanguageData.TSOA_PsyScalingWorkerExplanation:
This equipment scales its effectiveness based on psychic sensitivity.
scaling factor: {0}

For example, at 150% psychic sensitivity and 50% scaling:
Armor or weapon damage is increased by 25%.
LanguageData.TSOA_StatExchangerNoComp: Can't form psychic bond, target lacks a matching crown implant.
LanguageData.TSOA_StatExchangerAlreadyLinked: Can't form psychic bond, target is already linked to {0}.
LanguageData.TSOA_StatExchangerAtCapacity: {0} already has the maximum number of psychic links.
LanguageData.TSOA_StatExchangerUnlinkDeath: {0} has lost their psychic link to {1}, because {0} has died.
LanguageData.TSOA_StatExchangerUnlinkSurgery: {0} has lost their psychic link to {1}, because {0}'s crown has been removed.
LanguageData.TSOA_StatExchangeGizmoLinkDescription: Select a pawn to form a psychic link.
LanguageData.TSOA_VirionNotSpawned: {0} died outside of your map, and their Virion was wasted.
LanguageData.TSOA_VirionIncomplete: {0} has died before their Virion finished gestating, and it has emerged as a hostile entity!
LanguageData.TSOA_VirionComplete: {0} has finished gestating their Virion, and it has fatally emerged from them!
LanguageData.TSOA_VirionActiveMessage: {0}'s virion has become active, causing internal damage with its movements. Its activity will increase until it is successfully tended.
LanguageData.TSOA_VirionTendFailureMessage: {0}'s virion was not successfully tended. It is still active.
